config.thirdpersonmod.title: Cinematic Shoulder Camera Settings
config.thirdpersonmod.enabled.tooltip: Visual camera only; targeting and interactions still use the player eye ray.
config.thirdpersonmod.preset.tooltip: Apply a complete composition preset. Manual composition changes are shown as Custom.
config.thirdpersonmod.shoulder.tooltip: Place the camera over the left or right shoulder.
config.thirdpersonmod.distance.tooltip: Nominal camera distance behind the player, in blocks.
config.thirdpersonmod.shoulder_offset.to: Horizontal distance from the player center, in blocks.
config.thirdpersonmod.vertical_offset.to: Vertical distance from the player eye position, in blocks.
config.thirdpersonmod.vertical_smoothing: How quickly vertical offset changes. Higher is faster; 0 applies instantly.
config.thirdpersonmod.shoulder_transitio: How quickly the camera changes shoulders. Higher is faster; 0 applies instantly.
config.thirdpersonmod.minimum_distance.t: Preferred closest distance; wall safety can still move the camera closer.
config.thirdpersonmod.collision_radius.t: Radius used by the five-ray camera volume approximation.
config.thirdpersonmod.safety_margin.tool: Extra clearance retained between the camera and a blocking surface.
config.thirdpersonmod.collision_in.toolt: How quickly the camera moves toward the player near walls. Wall safety is always immediate; 0 snaps.
config.thirdpersonmod.collision_out.tool: How quickly camera distance recovers after leaving a wall. 0 snaps.
config.thirdpersonmod.disable_riding.too: Use the vanilla camera while the player is riding another entity.
config.thirdpersonmod.disable_sleeping.t: Use the vanilla camera while the player is sleeping.
config.thirdpersonmod.disable_swimming.t: Use the vanilla camera while the player is actively swimming.
config.thirdpersonmod.disable_crawling.t: Use the vanilla camera while crawling in the swimming pose.
config.thirdpersonmod.disable_fall_flyin: Use the vanilla camera during elytra flight.
config.thirdpersonmod.debug.tooltip: Log camera ownership changes without logging every frame.
config.thirdpersonmod.preview_notice: Changes preview live. Done saves; Cancel or Esc restores saved settings.
